name: wallhaven
title: Wallhaven
description: Browse and download desktop wallpapers from Wallhaven.
author: devadathanmb

commands.name: search-wallpapers
commands.title: Search Wallpapers
commands.description: Search Wallhaven with filters for category, purity, and sorting method.

commands.name: top-wallpapers
commands.title: Top Wallpapers
commands.description: Browse the top-rated Wallhaven wallpapers for a selected time range.

commands.name: my-collections
commands.title: My Collections
commands.description: Browse and set wallpapers from your personal Wallhaven collections.

commands.name: random-wallpaper
commands.title: Random Wallpaper
commands.description: Instantly set a random Wallhaven wallpaper as your desktop background.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Wallhaven API key. Required to access NSFW content and your collections. Get it from https://wallhaven.cc/settings/account

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: Username
preferences.description: Your Wallhaven username. Required for the My Collections command. Find it at https://wallhaven.cc/settings/account

preferences.name: downloadDir
preferences.title: Download Directory
preferences.description: Folder where downloaded wallpapers are saved. Defaults to ~/Downloads.

preferences.name: sfwOnly
preferences.title: Safe Search
preferences.label: SFW content only
preferences.description: Always restrict results to SFW content, even when an API key is provided. Disables the purity filter in Search Wallpapers.
